Explanation: An article from 2014 details a catastrophic in-home elevator accident that occurred on Thanksgiving, resulting in a child named Jordan Nelson suffering a paralyzing injury. The article describes how Jordan, the youngest in his family, was injured in an elevator accident at a rented beach house in South Carolina. The story is told from the perspective of his mother, Nikki Nelson, making Nikki the person whose sibling (Jordan) was catastrophically injured by the elevator on Thanksgiving. [1486]
Exact Answer: Nikki Nelson
